headline: Assessing Deere’s (DE) Valuation As Tech Pivot And Higher Profit Guidance Take Shape
summary: Deere’s tech pivot comes into focus Deere (DE) is drawing fresh attention as it expands its Smart Industrial platform, pushes autonomy ready equipment, and rolls out subscription based software models, while Q1 2026 results and higher profit guidance frame the story for investors. See our latest analysis for Deere. After a softer 7 day share price return of 4.51%, Deere shares now trade at US$567.69, with a 90 day share price return of 9.34% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 24.97%,...

headline: Smart Agriculture Market Size to Exceed USD 48.36 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
summary: By 2035, the U.S. smart agriculture market is expected to have grown from USD 7.35 billion in 2025 to USD 18.38 billion propelled by the widespread use of digital agriculture solutions, sophisticated farm equipment, and precision farming. National market growth is still being accelerated by high technological readiness, government measures that support it, sustainability-focused practices, and leadership from major firms like Trimble and John Deere.Austin, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Smar
